heading: Eligibility of distribution borrowers for loans, loan guarantees, and lien accommodations
label: 936d Eligibility of distribution borrowers for loans, loan guarantees, and lien accommodations

children.text: be considered a default by the distribution borrower;
reduce the eligibility of the distribution borrower for assistance under this chapter; or

be the cause, directly or indirectly, of imposing any requirement or restriction on the borrower as a condition of the assistance, except such requirements or restrictions as are necessary to implement a debt restructuring agreed on by the power supply borrower and the Government.
